scope.summary: Brings dispatch/tests.rs back under its committed file-size ratchet by splitting further (never raising the ratchet): three read-only gate refusal-shape test families moved verbatim into a sibling tests/gate_refusal_reasons.rs.
out_of_scope: Raising or editing the dispatch/tests.rs ratchet (left at 15676, untouched) — the fix is a further split, not a threshold change.
Editing any test assertion, fixture, or expected value — the families moved verbatim.

The 65 pre-existing dispatch::tests failures (guard/classifier behavior changes from other agents' work, e.g. UnprovenSideEffect refusals) — verified identical with this split stashed, so they are not caused by it.

entry_points.name: implementation commit
entry_points.trace: `git show --stat 7d2d1404` (ancestor of HEAD 0a51dcb9) reported exactly two paths: crates/oraclemcp/src/dispatch/tests.rs (-158 lines) and crates/oraclemcp/src/dispatch/tests/gate_refusal_reasons.rs (+166, new). The three families parameterization_hint, parenless_qualified_callable_gate, and structured_reason moved verbatim, following the established audit_wiring sibling-file pattern; no test was edited.

entry_points.name: extracted families pass with unchanged module paths
entry_points.trace: `cargo test -p oraclemcp --lib -- parameterization_hint parenless_qualified_callable_gate structured_reason` → 7 passed, 0 failed. Test paths are byte-identical to before (dispatch::tests::parameterization_hint::…, dispatch::tests::parenless_qualified_callable_gate::…, dispatch::tests::structured_reason::…), proving the split is isomorphic at the test-name level.

entry_points.name: full dispatch suite unchanged (isomorphism)
entry_points.trace: `cargo test -p oraclemcp --lib -- dispatch::tests` → 238 passed, 65 failed both WITH the split and with it stashed (clean HEAD). The 65 failures are pre-existing guard/classifier behavior changes from other agents' work, identical in both runs, so this split introduces zero new failures.

entry_points.name: ratchet now holds (the actual fix)
entry_points.trace: dispatch/tests.rs is 15549 lines, under its committed ratchet 15676 (was 15703, over by 27). `bash scripts/oraclemcp_arch_fitness_lint.sh` → 'oraclemcp-arch-fitness-lint: OK — workspace dependency graph points inward and file-size ratchets hold.' The ratchet line [crates/oraclemcp/src/dispatch/tests.rs]=15676 is unchanged; the script has no uncommitted edit from this bead.

entry_points.name: formatting
entry_points.trace: `cargo fmt -p oraclemcp -- --check` reports no diff in dispatch/tests.rs or gate_refusal_reasons.rs.

limitations: tree_clean is computed over the two scoped paths only, which are clean at HEAD; the wider shared checkout carries other agents' uncommitted work on unrelated files (constitution rule 13).

This is a scoped-test basis: isomorphism is proven by the extracted families passing with unchanged module paths and the full dispatch suite passing identically with the split stashed, not by a full workspace cargo gate (lease-gated, and currently red from foreign dispatch/guard work).
The 65 pre-existing dispatch::tests failures are documented as out-of-scope; they were verified identical on clean HEAD with this split stashed.
